title: On average, each year of schooling raises earnings by 10%
y_title: Returns to each additional year of schooling
source: Patrinos, H. 2024. Estimating the return to schooling using the Mincer equation. IZA World of Labor 2024: 278. The graphic shows estimates of the returns to education.
visdescription: The graphic shows a scatterplot of estimates of the returns to education on log GDP per capita.
keyFactLabel: Increase in earnings for each additional year of schooling globally.
